title: alirezarezvani/claude-skills
abstract: 337 Claude Code skills, agent skills, and plugins (30+ agents, 70+ commands, 330+ skills) for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 13 other coding agents. Covers engineering, marketing, product, compliance, research, and daily productivity.
abstract_zh: 337个Claude Code技能大合集！支持Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI、Cursor等13个AI编码Agent。覆盖工程、营销、产品、合规、高管顾问、研究、日常生产力等全领域。一仓库搞定所有技能需求。
